nodes.context: Mexican criminal organization led by Rafael Caro Quintero, operating in Sonora and Chihuahua.
Defunct Mexican cartel founded by Rafael Caro Quintero.
Criminal cell identified as the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel.
Mexican drug cartel, formerly led by Joaquín 'El Chapo' Guzmán.
Mexican drug cartel operating in Chihuahua.
Criminal cell led by Rodrigo Páez Quintero, nephew of Rafael Caro Quintero.
Criminal cell related to the Sinaloa Cartel.
Faction of the Sinaloa Cartel led by the sons of Joaquín Guzmán.
Mexican drug cartel listed as an ally of the Caborca Cartel in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: At present, the group has a bloody dispute with the Los Salazar criminal cell, identified as the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.context: Caborca Cartel is in a violent conflict with Los Salazar.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mexico , United States , Sinaloa Cartel
edges.context: Caborca Cartel lists Sinaloa Cartel as a rival in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The group allied with the Juárez Cartel to dispute the areas of Sonora and Chihuahua
edges.context: Caborca Cartel allied with Juárez Cartel to fight for territory.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Juárez Cartel , Jalisco New Generation Cartel
edges.context: Caborca Cartel lists Jalisco New Generation Cartel as an ally in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: the Los Salazar criminal cell, identified as the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel
edges.context: Los Salazar is the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: criminal cells Los Páez and/or Los Paleteros (led by Rodrigo Páez Quintero, nephew of Rafael Caro Quintero)
edges.context: Los Páez is a cell led by a nephew of the Caborca Cartel leader, likely allied.

edges.evidence_quote: Los Cazadores together with Los Salazar, (cells related to the Sinaloa Cartel)
edges.context: Los Cazadores is a cell related to the Sinaloa Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: the faction of Los Chapitos and Los Salazar, led by the sons of Guzmán
edges.context: Los Chapitos is a faction of the Sinaloa Cartel led by Guzmán's sons.

edges.evidence_quote: the main objective of Caro Quintero has been to dispute the territory of Sonora with the faction of Los Chapitos
edges.context: Caborca Cartel is in conflict with Los Chapitos over territory.
